ab_vengefulscripture.name: Vengeful Scripture
ab_vengefulscripture.text: Success, +1/2 DICE: pick enemy model within 18"; Success Roll is at +2 DICE if within 9". Make Injury Roll with +1 INJURY MODIFIER for each Blood Marker the model has. On Critical, Injury Roll also has IGNORE ARMOUR and +1 INJURY DICE for each Blood Marker the model has.

ab_fourpaws.name: Four Paws
ab_fourpaws.text: +1 DICE to Climb, Jump, or Dash Actions.

ab_hellhound.name: Hellhound
ab_hellhound.text: Attacks have +1 DICE and FIRE. If Warband is Knights of Avarice or BLACK GRAIL, Attacks have GAS instead of FIRE.

ab_lawofhell.name: Law of Hell
ab_lawofhell.text: Earns freedom by killing an enemy ELITE.

ab_devourtheguilty.name: Devour the Guilty
ab_devourtheguilty.text: Look this one up in the book big dawg, it's a long ass rule.

ab_goeticportal.name: Goetic Portal
ab_goeticportal.text: Risky Success, +1 DICE: Teleport this model 6". 1 enemy model on a 32mm base or smaller within 1" can be taken with this model.

ab_barbedembrace.name: Barbed Embrace
ab_barbedembrace.text: Enemy models within 1" of this model cannot Retreat.

ab_ironclawedhands.name: Iron Clawed Hands
ab_ironclawedhands.text: Can make a Melee Attack with CLEAVE 2 and CRITICAL. Off-Hand Weapon modifier applies to the second attack.

ab_goeticgaze.name: Goetic Gaze
ab_goeticgaze.text: Success: Place 1 Blood Marker next to enemy model within 24" and within line of sight. On Critical, instead place 2 Blood Markers.

ab_blessingsoftheserpentmoon.name: Blessing of the Serpent Moon
ab_blessingsoftheserpentmoon.text: Goetic (2/4/6) | Cast before an Injury Roll against this model. -1 INJURY MODIFIER for every 2 Blood Markers paid.

ab_shadowwalker.name: Shadow Walker
ab_shadowwalker.text: Goetic (2) | Enemy Models cannot make Melee Attack on this model when it Retreats.

ab_lefthandpath.name: Left-Hand Path
ab_lefthandpath.text: Goetic (2) | Model can teleport between terrain while Moving, Charging, Retreating, or Dashing.

ab_oraclebeastcloak.name: Oracle Beast Cloak
ab_oraclebeastcloak.text: Goetic (3) | Once per Turn, change the result of an Injury Roll to No Effect.

ab_bloodmagic.name: Blood Magic
ab_bloodmagic.text: Goetic (1) | Cast before any Injury Rolls for an attack made by this model. +1 INJURY DICE to all Injury Rolls for the attack.

ab_hateful.name: Hateful
ab_hateful.text: If Activated with within 12" and line of sight, of enemy model that is not BLACK GRAIL, or DEMONIC, this model must take a Charge Action against closest enemy model.

ab_torturer.name: Torturer
ab_torturer.text: Can target friendly models that are not DEMONIC with Melee Attacks. If it does, it cannot attack again during the same Activation.

ab_annihilator.name: Annihilator
ab_annihilator.text: Can take 1 Fight Action per activation with each equipped Melee Weapon.

ab_poisonstingers.name: Poison Stingers
ab_poisonstingers.text: Can make a Melee Attack with CLEAVE 2 and SHRAPNEL.

ab_demonicaura_sloth.name: Aura of Sloth
ab_demonicaura_sloth.text: Enemy models within 8" treat Minor Hits as Downs, including models that normally treat Downs and Minor Hits.

ab_demonicaura_envy.name: Aura of Envy
ab_demonicaura_envy.text: Enemy models within 12" cannot charge models that are already in melee.

ab_demonicaura_pride.name: Aura of Pride
ab_demonicaura_pride.text: At end of Activation, place 1 Blood Marker next to each enemy model within 8".

ab_demonicaura_greed.name: Aura of Greed
ab_demonicaura_greed.text: Enemy models within 12" that Charge must Charge this model if it's within line of sight and can be reached.

ab_demonicaura_wrath.name: Aura of Wrath
ab_demonicaura_wrath.text: +1 DICE to Melee Attack and Dash Actions for friendly models within 8".

ab_demonicaura_lust.name: Aura of Lust
ab_demonicaura_lust.text: Negate any of the Keywords or Special Rules of non-IMPERVIOUS Armour worn by enemy models within 4".

ab_demonicaura_gluttony.name: Aura of Gluttony
ab_demonicaura_gluttony.text: -1 DICE to rolls for enemy models within 8", unless they are BLACK GRAIL or ARTIFICIAL.

ab_holydna.name: Holy DNA
ab_holydna.text: At start of Activation, remove 1 Blood Marker or Infection Marker from this model. If you do, replace it with 1 Blessing Marker.

ab_talisman.name: Talisman
ab_talisman.text: Once per game, when a Risky Success Roll is failed, model's Activation does not end.

ab_fanfare.name: Fanfare
ab_fanfare.text: +1 DICE to Dash Actions for friendly models within 4".

ab_angelicfanfare.name: Angelic Fanfare
ab_angelicfanfare.text: +1 DICE to Dash Actions for friendly models within 8".

ab_shovel.name: Dug In
ab_shovel.text: Starts the game with COVER until model moves.

ab_spiritofthebeast.name: Spirit of the Beast
ab_spiritofthebeast.text: Once per Turn, +1 DICE to Melee Attack; or +1 INJURY DICE to Melee Attack; or +1 DICE to Dash Action.

ab_gruesomeweight.name: Gruesome Weight
ab_gruesomeweight.text: Model is deployed Down. Place 1 extra Blood Marker next to them if they are attacked on the first Turn before they have activated.

ab_markofthepit.name: Mark of the Pit
ab_markofthepit.text: After deployment, move 1 terrain piece 8" by 8" or smaller, 6". Check book for terms & conditions.

ab_luckofthedevil.name: Luck of the Devil
ab_luckofthedevil.text: Before deployment, set aside 3D6 and set them to 6. During the game, you can replace a D6 you are about to roll (except for an Injury Roll) with one of the dice set aside.

ab_disposablerocket.name: Disposable Rocket
ab_disposablerocket.text: After Injury Roll, move target D6" directly away. It stops if stops if it hits another model, Impassable terrain, or terrain it cannot cross.

ab_pummellingblows.name: Pummelling Blows
ab_pummellingblows.text: Can make a Melee Attack if unarmed.

ab_fireshield.name: Flame Repellent
ab_fireshield.text: -1 INJURY DICE to attacks with FIRE, even if the attack has IGNORE ARMOUR.

ab_searingflames.name: Searing Flames
ab_searingflames.text: At end of Activation, place 1 Blood Marker next to each enemy within 1" that does not have NEGATE FIRE.

ab_ambushweapon.name: Ambush Weapon
ab_ambushweapon.text: +2 INJURY MODIFIER against models that have not yet Activated.

ab_unnaturalinversion.name: Unnatural Inversion
ab_unnaturalinversion.text: +1 DICE if Cover or Long Range modifiers apply, instead of -1 DICE.

ab_agonisinginjuries.name: Agonising Injuries
ab_agonisinginjuries.text: Make Injury Rolls with 1D6, but double Blood Markers caused.

ab_mindenslaver.name: Mind Enslaver
ab_mindenslaver.text: Can only form a FIRETEAM with Homunculus that has Enslaved Mind.

ab_hellskull.name: Hell Skull
ab_hellskull.text: +2 DICE to Morale Checks while this model is not Down.

up_alchemicalformulae_elementalresistanc.name: Elemental Resistance
up_alchemicalformulae_elementalresistanc.text: -1 INJURY DICE to attacks with FIRE or GAS that target this model.

up_alchemicalformulae_enslavedmind.name: Enslaved Mind
up_alchemicalformulae_enslavedmind.text: Can only form FIRETEAM with model that has Mind Enslaver.

choices.prompt: Select model to join Fireteam with Homunculus

up_alchemicalformulae_additionalarm.name: Additional Arm
up_alchemicalformulae_additionalarm.text: When this model uses the Pummelling Blows Ability, it gains CLEAVE 2.

up_alchemicalformulae_hypnoticeyes.name: Hypnotic Eyes
up_alchemicalformulae_hypnoticeyes.text: -1 DICE to Melee Attacks that target this model, unless the attacking model is a Sniper Priest or BLACK GRAIL.

up_goetic_burninginferno.name: Burning Inferno
up_goetic_burninginferno.text: Goetic (1-3) | Make a Ranged Attack with Range of 36", FIRE, SCATTER, and BLAST X, where X is Blood Markers paid. Injury roll against primary target also has IGNORE ARMOUR.

up_goetic_slavemaster.name: Slavemaster
up_goetic_slavemaster.text: Goetic (1) | Command Yoke Fiend within 18" to Move, Shoot, Fight, or Die.

up_goetic_wrath_chargeofhatred.name: Charge of Hatred
up_goetic_wrath_chargeofhatred.text: Charge with Movement Characteristic of 12" and no Charge Bonus. Must take a Risky Success to charge any model other than the closest enemy in line of sight.

up_goetic_envy_covetedposition.name: Coveted Position
up_goetic_envy_covetedposition.text: Goetic (2) | Swap position with a model within 12" and line of sight.

up_goetic_envy_whatisyoursismine.name: What is Yours is Mine
up_goetic_envy_whatisyoursismine.text: Goetic (1) | Remove 1 Blood Marker or Blessing Marker from a model in line of sight, and place it next to this model.

up_goetic_lust_forbiddenpleasures.name: Forbidden Pleasures
up_goetic_lust_forbiddenpleasures.text: Place 3 Blood Markers next to a model in your Warband that is not DEMONIC.

up_goetic_lust_exquisitepain.name: Exquisite Pain
up_goetic_lust_exquisitepain.text: Goetic (1-2) | Place the Blood Markers paid next to a model within line of sight.

up_goetic_lust_callofflesh.name: Call of the Flesh
up_goetic_lust_callofflesh.text: Goetic (2) | Long one, check the book.

up_goetic_pride_prouddefiance.name: Proud Defiance
up_goetic_pride_prouddefiance.text: You do not have to take Morale Checks.

up_goetic_pride_tooproudtofall.name: Too Proud to Fall
up_goetic_pride_tooproudtofall.text: Goetic (2) | Cast before this model is taken Down. Ignore the Down result and remain standing, but still suffer any other effects of the Injury Roll or Rule.

up_goetic_pride_lightofsamael.name: Light of Samael
up_goetic_pride_lightofsamael.text: Goetic (2) | Make an Injury Roll against an enemy model within 24" and line of sight. If the model is on a 32mm base or smaller, move it D6" directly away. It stops if stops if it hits another model, Impassable terrain, or terrain it cannot cross.

up_goetic_sloth_morpheanmind.name: Morphean Mind
up_goetic_sloth_morpheanmind.text: Opponent cannot spend more than 1 Blood Marker to add -1 DICE to Success Rolls.

up_goetic_sloth_charmofacedia.name: Charm of Acedia
up_goetic_sloth_charmofacedia.text: Goetic (1) | The next Success or Risky Success roll automatically succeeds.

up_goetic_sloth_daemoniummeridianum.name: Daemonium Meridianum
up_goetic_sloth_daemoniummeridianum.text: Enemy models treat terrain within 6" as DIFFICULT TERRAIN.

up_goetic_gluttony_bellyofthebeast.name: Belly of the Beast
up_goetic_gluttony_bellyofthebeast.text: After a Melee Attack places at least 1 Blood Marker next to this model, place 1 Blood Marker next to the attacking model.

up_goetic_gluttony_uncaringgluttony.name: Uncaring Gluttony
up_goetic_gluttony_uncaringgluttony.text: Goetic (2) | Select and enemy model that has not activated, and a piece of equipment that is not CONSUMABLE. If it is DEPLOYABLE, it must be within 1" of the model. The selected equipment is unusable for the rest of the game.

up_goetic_gluttony_eateroftheflesh.name: Eater of the Flesh
up_goetic_gluttony_eateroftheflesh.text: After making a Melee Attack, remove 1 Blood Marker for each Blood Marker that is placed next to the target, as long as it is not BLACK GRAIL or DEMONIC.

up_goetic_greed_blackheart.name: Black Heart
up_goetic_greed_blackheart.text: Goetic (1) | Cast before a Success Roll or Risky Success Roll. Add +1 DICE to the roll.

up_goetic_greed_universalgreed.name: Greedy Hearts
up_goetic_greed_universalgreed.text: After deployment, place 1 Blessing Marker next to this model for each enemy model that is worth 150 ducats or more.

in_severenervedamage.name: Severe Nerve Damage
in_severenervedamage.text: All Success Rolls are treated as being Risky Success Rolls.

in_handwound.name: Hand Wound
in_handwound.text: -1 DICE to attacks made with Melee Weapons held (or joinly held) by the injured hand.

in_chestwound.name: Chest Wound
in_chestwound.text: +1 INJURY DICE to attacks targetting this model.

in_insomniac.name: Insomniac
in_insomniac.text: Must always be first model deployed.

in_shellshocked.name: Shell Shocked
in_shellshocked.text: Roll a D6 when deployed. On a 1-2, -1 DICE to rolls for this model.

in_darkmemory.comment: TODO: need to figure out how we're extracting the dark memory faction
in_darkmemory.name: Dark Memory

in_paranoid.name: Paranoid
in_paranoid.text: Cannot be deployed within 8" of a friendly model. Friendly models can be deployed within 8" of this model.

in_possessed.name: Posessed
in_possessed.text: When this model is Activated, if it is more than 1" from any enemy models the first Action that it takes must take a Dash Action, even if another rule states that it cannot take a Dash Action. In addition, the first 3" of this move must be in a straight line directly away from its starting position, if it is possible for it to do so. If the model is Down at the start of the Activation, it will stand up if it can do so and must then attempt to move 3" in a straight line away from its starting position.

in_facialscar.comment: TODO: need to figure out how we're extracting the prominent scar faction
in_facialscar.name: Prominent Scar

sk_standfirm.comment: TODO: maybe generate Stand Firm tokens like how we generate Tough tokens?
sk_standfirm.name: Stand Firm
sk_standfirm.text: First Down is treated as a Minor Hit instead.

sk_parry.name: Parry
sk_parry.text: -1 DICE to Melee Attacks against this model.

sk_closequartercombat.name: Close Quarter Combat
sk_closequartercombat.text: +1 DICE and +1 INJURY DICE to Melee Attacks if in contact with terrain.

sk_relentlesscharge.name: Relentless Charge
sk_relentlesscharge.text: +1 DICE to Melee Attacks if successfully charged earlier this Activation.

sk_hardasnails.comment: TODO: maybe generate Hard as Nails tokens like how we generate Tough tokens?
sk_hardasnails.name: Hard as Nails
sk_hardasnails.text: First Down is treated as a No Effect instead.

sk_champion.name: Champion
sk_champion.text: Melee Weapons that do not have CLEAVE gain CLEAVE 2; -1 DICE to second Melee Attack made with weapon that gains CLEAVE.

sk_surgicalstrike.name: Surgical Strike
sk_surgicalstrike.text: Once per Activation, before an Injury Roll, gain IGNORE ARMOUR.

sk_sixthsense.comment: TODO: maybe generate Sixth Sense tokens like how we generate Tough tokens?
sk_sixthsense.name: Sixth Sense
sk_sixthsense.text: First Down is treated as a Minor Hit instead, if model has no Blood Markers.

sk_assassinate.name: Assassinate
sk_assassinate.text: +1 DICE to attacks against models that have not yet Activated.

sk_shadowwalker.name: Shadow Walker
sk_shadowwalker.text: -2 DICE to Ranged Attacks against this model at Long Range, instead of -1 DICE.

sk_athletic.name: Athletic
sk_athletic.text: +1 DICE to Climb, Jump, or Diving Charge Actions; and -1 INJURY DICE to Injury if failed.

sk_disengage.name: Disengage
sk_disengage.text: Enemy Models cannot make Melee Attack on this model when it Retreats.

sk_incoming.name: Incoming
sk_incoming.text: Charge Bonus gains an additional D6 (choose single highest).

sk_nimble.name: Nimble
sk_nimble.text: Do not halve Movement when this model stands up.

sk_dodge.name: Dodge
sk_dodge.text: -1 DICE to Ranged Attacks targeting this model.

sk_gunslinger.name: Gunslinger
sk_gunslinger.text: If equipped with 2 Weapons with PISTOL, can take Shoot Action with one, then immediately take Shoot Action with the other.

sk_snipersnest.name: Sniper's Nest
sk_snipersnest.text: +2 DICE from Elevated Position, instead of +1 DICE.

sk_pointblank.name: Point Blank
sk_pointblank.text: Can use Ranged Weapon and Ranged Attack Characteristic for Melee Attacks.

sk_headshot.name: Head shot
sk_headshot.text: Ranged Attacks have IGNORE ARMOUR on Critical Success.

sk_skillandexpertise.comment: TODO: need to figure out how we're extracting the skills & expertise action
sk_skillandexpertise.name: Skill & Expertise

sk_blessedmurder.name: Blessed Murder
sk_blessedmurder.text: Gain 1 Blessing Marker on Melee kill.

sk_sadistic.name: Sadistic
sk_sadistic.text: +1 DICE and +1 INJURY DICE to Melee Attacks if target is Down.

sk_hellfire.name: Hellfire
sk_hellfire.text: Risky Success: Draw line to friendly model within 18" and within line of sight, and make Injury Roll with FIRE for each model touched by the line (including the model drawn to, but not this model).

sk_bloodsacrifice.name: Blood Sacrifice
sk_bloodsacrifice.text: Success: Remove 1 Blood Marker from model and place it next to another model within 6", within line of sight, and not ARTIFICIAL, BLACK GRAIL, or DEMONIC.

sk_lashofacheron.name: Lash of Acheron
sk_lashofacheron.text: Risky Success: Make Injury Roll with IGNORE ARMOUR against enemy model within 6" and within line of sight.

sk_fruitfromthetreeofgoodandevil.comment: TODO: include the selected skill too
sk_fruitfromthetreeofgoodandevil.name: Eaten of the Fruit

choices.prompt: Select Ranged Weapon for Incendiary Ammunition

eq_koraktorthegreattomeofhell.name: Koraktor, the Great Tome of Hell

fc_ironsultanate_fv_fidaiofalamut.name: Fidai of Alamut - The Cabal of Assassins

fc_newantioch_fc_stortruppenofthefreesta.name: Stoßtruppen of the Free State of Prussia
